description: For the urbane male with panache, this Reeplay fragrance for men from reebok, has traces of the oceanic breeze in the afternoons and aromas of spices and woods. Reminiscent of a nostalgic journey back in time, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable crimson flask, has tones of lavender and cedar. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
